title: helixanthera cylindrica
intro: Helixanthera cylindrica, also known as the "cylinder vine" or "twisted witch", is a parasitic flowering plant that belongs to the family Loranthaceae. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, Helixanthera cylindrica is often used as a tincture, decoction, or infused in tea, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and skin conditions.
